remember: Students will be able to recall the plot and characters of the novel Indigo.
Students will be able to identify the key events and themes of the novel.
Students will be able to summarize the novel's narrative in their own words.
understand: Students will be able to understand the social and historical context in which the novel is set.
Students will be able to interpret the symbolism and imagery used in the novel.
Students will be able to analyze the character development and relationships in the novel.
apply: Students will be able to apply their understanding of the novel to a specific context or scenario.
Students will be able to use evidence from the novel to support a particular argument or interpretation.
Students will be able to identify and explain the themes and motifs of the novel.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the novel's use of language and literary devices to convey meaning.
Students will be able to evaluate the novel's portrayal of historical and social issues.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the novel with other texts or contexts.

ncert_objectives: To understand the plot and characters of the novel Indigo.
To analyze the social and historical context in which the novel is set.
To identify and explain the themes and motifs of the novel.
board_exam_objectives: To answer questions on the plot, characters, and themes of the novel.
To analyze and interpret the symbolism and imagery used in the novel.
To evaluate the novel's portrayal of historical and social issues.
